# Platform Guide

Intro text explains valuesFrom and platform setup.

<Callout type="info">
JSX content should be tolerated without becoming code.
</Callout>

## Install

Install the package before configuring values.

```bash
helm upgrade platform ./chart \
  --set valuesFrom=config.yaml
```

Follow-up prose after the install command.

## Configure

```ts
export const valuesFrom = ["config.yaml", "secret.yaml"];
```

Configuration prose references valuesFrom again.
